name: Prototype — Act 1 layout
_doc: Act 1 layout per newGameDesign/PROTOTYPE_PLAN.md §4 typical playthrough. 12 zombies pre-placed across 3 ring distances. 4 wall ghosts (1 active in State B, 1 more activated in D, the remaining 2 reserved for Act 2's State E). 2 spawn pads (Scout + Bruiser) hidden until State C. 6 trees clustered ~10-14 tiles north for wood gathering.
entities: _doc 12 zombies pre-placed at the spawn area (~z=-19 to -26, north). 5 marchers commit to chasing the player from boot (permanentChase EnemyAI flag); other 7 wander idle near spawn until the player approaches their aggroRadius. Per PROTOTYPE_PLAN §4 typical playthrough: '12 zombies pre-placed; 5 aggro on player.'
_doc 5 marchers at z=-19, spread east-west — walk south at speed 4 → reach player (z=0) in ~4.75s
_doc 7 idlers at z=-22 to -26, scattered — wander idle near spawn (outside aggroRadius 8)

_doc 6 trees clustered ~10-14 tiles north of player for wood gathering. Trees at z=-12 / -14 are outside the perimeter and become unreachable once the north fence is built — they'll be reachable again once the auto-sink-logs feature lands.
_doc 4 INSIDE-PERIMETER trees so the staged build (D/E/F) can finish without auto-sink. Move/remove these once auto-sink lets the player reach the outer trees again.
_doc TEST: 1 Scout + 1 Bruiser pre-spawned next to player so we can immediately watch their attack anims without draining essence into spawn pads. Remove once balancing is locked.

_doc TEST PR #3.2: pre-spawn an ACTIVE worker pad east of player. Its OnSpawn fires on the next frame and spawns wood-worker + essence-collector + worker-builder at offsets ±1.2u. Wood-worker has full AI in PR #3.2 (chops the nearest inside-perimeter tree at (6, 5), brings wood back to this pad). Essence/Builder visible but inert until PR #3.3. Remove once Act 3 is shippable end-to-end.
_fenceDoc: 20u × 20u palisade-log enclosure with staged build. Each side is hidden at boot; filling its unlock-zone fires `zone:built` with the side tag, which main.js maps to `fence:revealSide`, lazily showing logs + creating colliders. Order in Act 1: B → north, C (army), D → south. Act 2 adds east + west.
_spawnNote: PrototypeStateMachine.entryActions of each state call EnemySystem.setConfig() with prototypeStates.json spawnConfigs. Pre-placed enemies above are counted toward maxAlive; spawner adds new ones once kills drop the count below the cap.
_wallZoneDoc: 4 fence-side build zones (one per cardinal direction). Each is a build-type drain pad with no archetype — on completion it emits zone:built with its tag, which main.js maps to fence:revealSide for that side. Pads sit ~7u inside the perimeter so the player drains from inside their base.

unlockZones._doc: North wall zone — Act 1 state B. Drains 10W+3E to raise the north palisade.
South wall zone — Act 1 state D.
East wall zone — Act 1 state E (test extension).
West wall zone — Act 1 state F (test extension).
Scout Pad — drains 4E to spawn 1 Scout (was 8E; lowered for prototype testing while Act 3 is being built). Activated in State C. Cell [16,11] = world (-8,2), 8 tiles west.
Bruiser Pad — drains 8E to spawn 1 Bruiser (was 15E; lowered for prototype testing). Activated in State C. Cell [16,19] = world (8,2), 8 tiles east.

Worker Pad — Act 3 state G. Drains 15E to build worker-pad-active, which (via OnSpawn) spawns 3 worker children at offsets ±1.2u. Cell [16,13] = world (-4, 2). West-central, inside perimeter, clear of trees/test soldiers/other pads.
